title: Escuintla Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Escuintla, with a Z-Score of +3.71. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Escuintla is characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 57%, and the wind speed is moderate at 7.7 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has significant implications for various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact immediately.
